title: scrophularia modesta
intro: Scrophularia modesta, also known as the modest figwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Scrophularia modesta include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used in capsule form, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
